name: sql-backend-integration-gap
description: SqlBackend compiles queries but cannot execute them - it notes 'tables to query against' don't exist. DDL generator fills this gap by creating those tables. Integration point: SqlBackend consumers need DDL output to provision database.
relevantCode:
throw new Error(
  'SqlBackend.execute() is not implemented. ' +
  'Use compileSelect(), compileCount(), or compileExists() to generate SQL, ' +
  'then execute against your database.'
)
recommendation: DDL generator should be usable standalone and also integrated with schema provisioning workflow. Consider DDLGenerator class or generateDDL() function.
